    A

    AssignAction(int) - Method in class PathModel
    Assigns Action based of the row of the object
    AssignRow(String) - Method in class PathModel
    Find the row of the object based of its name and return the value

    C

    CreateArray() - Method in class PathModel
    Read the whole CSV file based on the path and store the data in the 2D array for path 3

    G

    Game5Beat() - Method in class PathModel
    Generate the random number for the 3 beats in the beat game
    GetData(String, int) - Method in class PathModel
    Return the value of the specific column of the 2D array based on the object name.

    L

    loadArray() - Method in class PathModel
    Load csv file into array

    P

    PathModel - Class in Unnamed Package
     
    PathModel(String) - Constructor for class PathModel
    Constructor that takes the name of the csv file to run the methods
